plainEnglishSummary: Beaumont Royal Oak is part of Corewell Health and the primary teaching hospital for OUWB SOM. Visiting fourth-year medical students from US LCME or COCA-accredited schools can apply via VSLO. Sub-internships in Family Medicine, IM, Surgery, Pediatrics. Cost, visa, and duration not stated on the hub.
driftCheck: This advanced national USCE discovery because MI gained a third P101 packet (after Henry Ford + DMC/WSU); Beaumont Royal Oak documented as OUWB teaching hub.
